title: alyssum viride
intro: Alyssum viride is a perennial herb belonging to the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as wild cabbage. It is native to Europe and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Alyssum viride can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
